meta_title: IT Staff Augmentation | Nearshore Software Engineers
meta_description: Specialized software engineers and IT professionals, with senior-level expertise across multiple technologies, integrated into development teams.
subtitle: Integrate technology professionals into your team based on your project’s needs.
title_animation: Adding IT talent to your team allows you to quickly scale your capabilities and ensure the precise execution of your projects.
subtitle_animation: We seamlessly integrate into your organizational culture, acting as partners who reinforce your innovation and optimize efficiency at every stage.

item_accordion.title: 1. Defining project needs:
item_accordion.description: We work with you to understand the project requirements and determine the necessary skills and profiles for the team.

item_accordion.title: 2. Talent recruitment and selection:
item_accordion.description: We search within our internal team or open new recruitment efforts, assess and select the right candidates, ensuring their skills align perfectly with your team’s needs.

item_accordion.title: 3. Technical evaluation:
item_accordion.description: Pre-selected candidates are tested with specific technical assessments, followed by interviews so you can evaluate the most relevant profiles, ensuring their technical skills and cultural compatibility are a match.

item_accordion.title: 4. Team integration and onboarding:
item_accordion.description: Once selected, team members are quickly integrated into yours through an onboarding process, adapting to your processes, tools, and organizational culture.

item_accordion.title: 5. Project monitoring:
item_accordion.description: Continuous monitoring ensures team members stay aligned with project objectives, making adjustments as needed, with ongoing support from HR and engineering.

data_talent.description: He is agile in project execution
He facilitates work and technological adaptation processes
He generates value through commitment and cohesion
He has the knowledge, technical and human experience to support transformation processes
He is innovative in the creation and development of outstanding solutions
He has high performance in the execution of business objectives
He works under a corporate culture
